notes.text: Love me a church. So stark!
Homemade sourdough and beef from next door. And $9 cokes.
Our first off roading adventure in the Land Cruiser
737 Max. Wish us luck!
Nerd Becah was in nerd heaven
Glad we weren't on the boardwalk in 2008!

Too overcast to see all the great colors

Duster cars. Cute.
Not so hot that you can't stay in for a while!

Café Bryggjan

Lamb and lobster soup. 

They were out of pickled herring and one of us was sad :(. But they had local beer so that made up for it.

Snorkeling between tectonic plates! 2 degree Celsius water. So we had dry suits. Which are just like they advertise. Pretty amazing. Lips frozen but rest of body pretty comfy. Water had (apparently) the most visibility of anywhere on earth. It was quite clear.
Nice hike w waterfalls and continental a divides.
Well we got some shorties. Highlight was litl geysir
Bigger than Niagra, apparently!
Lebowski bar! Very dedicated to the movie. Sorry France didn't play better but vamos Spain! It
I would hardly say this was a secret most people were visiting both but it was worth it. And quite wet.
Lots of tourists so we're gonna come at the crack of dawn which really means time of day because there's no darkness!
No rain is gonna prevent this Oakland love pic.
We are at Strondin pub in Vic. Got here just in time to get a table.
The Toyota Land Cruiser has a new Action shot. It's quite photogenic wouldn't u say?
Our first Icelandic hotdog! Guess who got the one with Doritos?
